caption:
Lots of Christmas happenings in Al Seef Dubai! 🤩

🎄See the festive tree which is one of the tallest in the region!
🎅 Meet Santa at Santa’s Grotto
🎁 Watch live performances and participate in workshops 

Event timings: 5 PM onwards. Please check the winter programme at @alseefdubai page. 

Christmas • Christmas in Dubai • #AlSeefDubai • Winter activities in Dubai • Things to do in Dubai • Lady and her Sweet Escapes

transcription.text: You're here, where you should be Snow is falling as the candles sing It just wasn't the same Alone on Christmas Day
